chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Spl. STRA 638 of 2020 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge. 1. For orders on office objection / reply 2. For orders on CMA No.2628/2020 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.2629/2020 06.11.2025 Ms. Summiya Kalwar, advocate for the applicant Mr. Zamir A. Khalid, Commissioner (Legal) S.R.B. Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
